lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (fungola ya biyano te)
lingala.explain_in_your_own_words: Limbola na maloba na yo moko...
lingala.drill_in_study_hall: 📚 Salá momesano na Ndako ya Boyekoli
lingala.allobot_starbound_sage: AlloBot: Moto ya bwanya ya Minzoto
lingala.claim_daily_essence_bonus: Zwá Litomba ya Ntina ya mokolo na mokolo
lingala.daily_bonus_ready: Litomba ya mokolo na mokolo ezali pene!
lingala.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Ntina emataka na kotala motango ya bisaleli-liziba oyo osalaki momesano.
lingala.welcome_future_sage: Boyei bolamu, Moto ya bwanya ya lobi!
lingala.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Maji ya Moto ya bwanya efungwamaka soki ozali kokende liboso na bisaleli mosusu ya STEM Lab — Molukiluki ya likolo, Laboratware ya Matematiki, RoadReady mpe bongo na bongo. Maji nyonso ezali makoki ya momesano-bozongisi — obetaka yango na koyanola motuna oyo euti na esika ya esaleli wana.
lingala.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: Kitisá tii na «Naino kokuta te» mpe fina buto
lingala.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: ya maji nyonso. Ekomema yo na esaleli oyo efungoli yango.
lingala.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot azali kotala bokoli na yo bisika nyonso. Mosala, mokakatano to momesano moko na esaleli mosusu ekobanda kofungola maji awa.
lingala.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Fungola Ndako ya Boyekoli — lolenge ya momesano ntango te
lingala.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Momesano ntango te · Libebi te · Ndimbola mobimba
lingala.view_your_progress_dashboard: Tala tableau ya bokoli na yo
lingala.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI epesaka lisungi ntango moyekoli asalaka mingi ya mosala ya makanisi. Boyekoli ya solo + bokengeli ya malamu.
lingala.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Boyekoli ya solo esalemaka na lisungi ya AI. Boyokani ezali na bokatikati.
lingala.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Boyekoli moke, likama moke. Kebá na kotyela motema mingi mokemoke.
lingala.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Ntalo ya libunga likolo + milende ya moyekoli moke + AI na kati ya bozongeli = biuti oyo emonanaka lokola sembo kasi eumelaka te na mosala.
lingala.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI ezali kosala mosala nyonso. Moyekoli azwaka biyano kasi bososoli te. Mayele ekitaka to ekolaka soki moke te.
lingala.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Botali Mokumba ya Mosala ya AI — Nani azali kokanisa?
lingala.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Tyá nivo ya lisungi ya AI, milende ya moyekoli, bosika ya mosala mpe ntalo ya libunga. Kokanisa ezaleli ya boyekoli. Manaka te, komonisa te.
lingala.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Likanisi na yo (Ntango nini lisungi ya AI esungaka na esika ya kobebisa? Wapi okobenda molongo?)
lingala.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: ndakisa, na misala ya sika AI azali moninga ya kokanisa; na mosala ya mbala na mbala ekataka mayele...
lingala.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Lisungi ya AI + milende ya moyekoli motango > 100 — lisungi ya koleka esalaka nini na litomba ya boyekoli?
lingala.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Mpo na nini bosika ezali na ntina mpo na boyekoli mpe likama nyonso mibale?
lingala.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Ntango nini AI kosala 90% ya mosala ezali mokano ya sembo ya solo? (Elembo: ntalo ya libunga moke, bosika moke, bobimisi na botindiki ya ntango.)
lingala.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Ndenge nini okosala kelasi epai AI endimami kasi boyekoli ekatani te?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini bosangani oyo ya AI/milende/bosika/ntalo epesi ezaleli oyo.
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ya botali — manaka te, komonisa te, eyano elobamaka te. «Litomba ya boyekoli» ezali kokanisa; komeka ya solo esengeli botali liboso/nsima, misala ya bopusi mpe botali ya bobateli. Bopusi ya lisungi ya AI ekesenaka na kotala domaine (bokeli vs tekiniki vs bomanyoli).
lingala.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Bongisá tii maji 3. Na mobembo oyo okoki kobeta kaka maji oyo ebongisami.
lingala.choose_your_challenge_level: Poná nivo na yo ya mokakatano
lingala.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Poná oyo ebongi lelo. Okoki kobongola oyo na mobembo nyonso. Mokakatano likolo = litomba monene ya ntina.
lingala.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Naino bobongisi te. Tongá bisaleli oyo olingi, na nsima fina «Bomba oyo ya sikoyo» mpo na kobomba yango mpo na mbala mosusu.
lingala.infinite_question_bank: ✨ Banki ya mituna oyo esuki te
lingala.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Mituna oyo etikali esilaka ata moke te — Gemini asalaka ya sika mbala moko.
lingala.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Mituna oyo AI asali ekoki kozala mabe (ata eyano oyo elakisami) — soki eloko emonani lokola ekamwa yebisá molakisi na yo.
lingala.set_goals_for_this_expedition: Tyá mikano mpo na mobembo oyo
lingala.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Bolukiluki: mikano ya sikisiki ebongisaka mosala + bokebi. Poná nyonso.
lingala.rewards_fast_correct_retrieval: Efutaka bozongisi ya mbangu + ya sembo
lingala.rewards_versatility_not_one_trick: Efutaka bosalisi ndenge na ndenge, mayele moko te
lingala.interrupt_a_boss_special: Kata likambo ya ntina ya boss
lingala.crit_during_the_winding_phase: Salá ya ntina na eleko ya bomibongisi
lingala.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Longa bobeti maji ya ntina (sembo + na nse ya sekonde 6) mpo na kokata mpe kokitisa libebi.
lingala.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Kotyela motema koleka: oyokaki solo kasi ozangaki. Ebongi na botali ya mibale na Ndako ya Boyekoli.
lingala.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Bokanisi ya libaku — kasi mbala mosusu oyebaki koleka oyo okanisaki!
lingala.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Boyebi ya nzoto: olakisaki tembe, mpe tembe ezalaki sembo. Bakisá na botali.
lingala.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Motuna oyo AI asali — eyano oyo elakisami ekoki kozala mabe. Soki emonani lokola ekamwa yebisá molakisi.
lingala.interrupt_a_boss_special_2: Kata likambo ya ntina ya boss
lingala.this_run_per_spell_breakdown: 🔍 Mbangu oyo — botali maji na maji
lingala.accuracy_by_stated_confidence_well_cal: Bosembo na kotala kotyela motema oyo elobami; ba-bar oyo ebongisami malamu emataka uta «kokanisa» tii «nayebaki».
lingala.recommended_next_steps: Matambe oyo elandi oyo epesami toli
lingala.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Yekola lisusu oyo obungaki. Soki ososoli lakisá «Nasosoli sikoyo».
lingala.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Eloko nini moko oyekolaki to omonaki na mbangu oyo? (Kokoma elendisaka bokundoli koleka kokanisa.)
lingala.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: ndakisa, «Motuna ya nzoi/fololo ezali kokosa ngai mbala na mbala — bosangani = bango mibale bazwaka litomba»
lingala.return_to_spellforge: Zonga na Esika ya kosala maji
lingala.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Salelá ntina mpo na kozindisa bilembo ya maji nyonso. Nivo likolo = libebi ya moboko mingi + mabeta minene ya ntina.
lingala.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Naino maji ya kobongisa te. Fungola maji na kosakana bisaleli mosusu ya STEM Lab.
lingala.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Momesano ntango te. HP te. Libebi te. Bozongisi + ndimbola kaka. Mituna oyo obungaki ezongaka nokinoki.
lingala.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Naino maji efungwami te. Sakaná bisaleli mosusu ya STEM Lab mpo na kofungola maji, na nsima zonga awa mpo na momesano.
lingala.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Mituna ezali te na molongo ya botali. To osakani mingi te to ozali kosala malamu mingi. Meká Ndako ya Boyekoli mpo na momesano ya likama moke to banda mobembo.
lingala.back_to_spellforge: Zonga na Esika ya kosala maji
lingala.question: ❓ Motuna
lingala.why_this_is_correct: ✓ Mpo na nini oyo ezali sembo
lingala.still_tough_keep_in_queue: Ezali kaka makasi — tika na molongo
lingala.boss_specials_blocked: Makambo ya ntina ya ba-boss oyo epekisami
lingala.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Beta maji nyonso ata mbala 3 mpo na komona makasi na yo ya malamu.
lingala.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Naino bisika ya bolembu elakisami te. Kobá kobeta!
lingala.confidence_calibration_health: 🧠 Bokolongono ya bobongisi ya kotyela motema
lingala.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Soki olobi «nayebi» mpe oyebi ya solo — wana nde bobongisi. Bokeseni (kotyela motema koleka/moke) ezali ntalo ebombani ya boyekoli.
lingala.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Naino bomanyoli ebombami te. Nsima ya mobembo nyonso komá eloko moko oyo omonaki to oyekolaki. Yo ya lobi akopesa yo ya lelo matondi.
lingala.loading_allobot_sage: Ezali kotisa AlloBot Moto ya bwanya...
